name: Vortex
description: A WebGL-powered animated vortex/portal effect that renders a swirling particle system, creating a mesmerizing visual focus point.
whenToUse: Use for hero sections, loading states, or visual transitions where you want a dramatic spinning vortex/portal animation.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render above the vortex effect

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the vortex container

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the outer container

props.name: particleCount
props.description: Number of particles in the vortex

props.name: baseSpeed
props.description: Base rotation speed of the vortex
